apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-travel-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-travel-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-travel-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-travel-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-travel-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - secretRef:
            name: ts-travel-mysql
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 12346
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 12346
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-travel-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 12346
  selector:
    app: ts-travel-service
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-travel-mysql
type: Opaque
stringData:
  TRAVEL_MYSQL_HOST: tsdb-mysql-leader
  TRAVEL_MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
  TRAVEL_MYSQL_DATABASE: ts
  TRAVEL_MYSQL_USER: ts
  TRAVEL_MYSQL_PASSWORD: Ts_123456

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-gateway-service-config
data:
  application.yml: |-
    # HTTP Server
    server:
      port: 18888  # HTTP (Tomcat) port

    spring:
      main:
        web-application-type: reactive
      application:
        name: ts-gateway-service
      cloud:
        nacos:
          discovery:
            server-addr: ${NACOS_ADDRS:127.0.0.1:8848}
        gateway:
          routes:
            - id: admin-basic-info
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_BASIC_INFO_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-basic-info-service}
              predicates:
                - Path=/api/v1/adminbasicservice/**

            - id: admin-order
              uri: lb://${ADMIN_ORDER_SERVICE_HOST:ts-admin-order-service}
              predicates:

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-gateway-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-gateway-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-gateway-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: ts-gateway-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-gateway-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        volumeMounts:
        - name: ts-gateway-service-config
          mountPath: /config/application.yml
          subPath: application.yml
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18888
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 18888
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: ts-gateway-service-config
        configMap:
          name: ts-gateway-service-config
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-gateway-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 18888
    nodePort: 30467
  selector:
    app: ts-gateway-service
  type: NodePort
